# Indoor Positioning Research, Engineering, and Deployment Hub

Updated: 2026-07-09

Ahmed Mansour research hub for indoor positioning, indoor localization, indoor navigation, Wi-Fi fingerprinting, smartphone sensing, pedestrian dead reckoning, mobile crowdsensing, autonomous radio-map generation, 3D radio mapping, floor detection, indoor-outdoor awareness, GNSS/PDR integration, and deployment-oriented indoor spatial intelligence.

This file is a machine-readable guide for readers, search engines, and AI systems. It explains the purpose of the site, the core pages, the homepage research-area map, the publication portfolio, direct PDF resources, and citation-oriented metadata.

## Core pages

- Home and research-area map: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/
- Publications: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications.html
- Research Themes: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/research-themes.html
- Datasets and Code: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/resources.html
- Citation Resources: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/citation-resources.html
- About Ahmed Mansour: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/about.html
- Metadata JSON: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/data/publications.json
- BibTeX: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/papers/publications.bib
- Public CV: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/assets/cv/ahmed-mansour-public-cv.pdf
- Sitemap: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/sitemap.xml

## Homepage research areas

### Research Area 1: Enhancing Inertial Positioning Performance

Infrastructure-free pedestrian navigation using smartphone inertial sensing, PDR, heading initialization, body-to-platform alignment, gyroscope drift control, magnetic disturbance handling, carrying-mode changes, and long-term inertial error correction.

Representative works:
- Drift Control of Pedestrian Dead Reckoning (PDR) for Long Period Navigation under Different Smartphone Poses (2021): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/drift-control-pdr-long-period-navigation-smartphone-poses.html
- Enhancing real-time heading estimation for pedestrian navigation via deep learning and smartphone embedded sensors (2025): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/enhancing-real-time-heading-estimation-deep-learning-smartphone-sensors.html
- Hybrid Neural Network-Based PDR with Multi-Layer Heading Correction Across Smartphone Carrying Modes (2026): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/hybrid-neural-network-pdr-multi-layer-heading-correction.html
- GNSS Positioning Aided with Pedestrian Dead Reckoning (PDR) in Urban Areas (2026): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/gnss-positioning-aided-with-pdr-in-urban-areas.html
- Tightly Coupled Bluetooth Enhanced GNSS/PDR System for Pedestrian Navigation in Dense Urban Environments (2024): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/tightly-coupled-bluetooth-enhanced-gnss-pdr-urban.html
- AC-HMM: azimuth-constrained hidden Markov model-based map matching for robust pedestrian positioning in urban canyons (2026): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/ac-hmm-azimuth-constrained-map-matching-urban-canyons.html

### Research Area 2: Scaling Wi-Fi Fingerprinting and Autonomous Radio-Map Generation

Wi-Fi RSS fingerprinting, mobile crowdsensing, multisensor session logs, autonomous radio-map generation, map maintenance, reliability control, and scalable indoor reference construction.

Representative works:
- Reliability-governed scaling of mobile crowdsensing-based 3D radio mapping for ubiquitous indoor positioning: An uncertainty-aware lifecycle review and deployment-oriented pipeline (2026): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/reliability-governed-3d-radio-mapping-lifecycle-review.html
- Towards Ubiquitous IPS: Leveraging Crowdsourced Data Accumulation Over Time to Alleviate Reliance on External Sources in Initial Fingerprinting Map Generation (2024): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/towards-ubiquitous-ips-crowdsourced-data-accumulation.html
- Leveraging human mobility and pervasive smartphone measurements-based crowdsourcing for developing self-deployable and ubiquitous indoor positioning systems (2023): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/leveraging-human-mobility-pervasive-smartphone-crowdsourcing.html
- Everywhere: A Framework for Ubiquitous Indoor Localization (2023): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/everywhere-framework-ubiquitous-indoor-localization.html

### Research Area 3: Seamless Indoor-Outdoor Positioning and Multi-Source Fusion

Continuity across outdoor, transition, and indoor spaces using GNSS, PDR, Wi-Fi, BLE, barometer, map constraints, indoor-outdoor awareness, and source-reliability switching.

Representative works:
- SUNS: A User-Friendly Scheme for Seamless and Ubiquitous Navigation Based on an Enhanced Indoor-Outdoor Environmental Awareness Approach (2022): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/suns-seamless-ubiquitous-navigation-indoor-outdoor-awareness.html
- GNSS Positioning Aided with Pedestrian Dead Reckoning (PDR) in Urban Areas (2026): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/gnss-positioning-aided-with-pdr-in-urban-areas.html
- Tightly Coupled Bluetooth Enhanced GNSS/PDR System for Pedestrian Navigation in Dense Urban Environments (2024): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/tightly-coupled-bluetooth-enhanced-gnss-pdr-urban.html
- AC-HMM: azimuth-constrained hidden Markov model-based map matching for robust pedestrian positioning in urban canyons (2026): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/ac-hmm-azimuth-constrained-map-matching-urban-canyons.html

### Research Area 4: 3D Radio-Map Generation from Mobile Crowdsensing

3D radio-map generation from mobile crowdsensing, floor-local map skeletons, building-level 3D assembly, global refinement, vertical positioning, floor recognition, and multi-level indoor spatial context.

Representative works:
- Reliability-governed scaling of mobile crowdsensing-based 3D radio mapping for ubiquitous indoor positioning: An uncertainty-aware lifecycle review and deployment-oriented pipeline (2026): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/reliability-governed-3d-radio-mapping-lifecycle-review.html
- Towards Ubiquitous IPS: Leveraging Crowdsourced Data Accumulation Over Time to Alleviate Reliance on External Sources in Initial Fingerprinting Map Generation (2024): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/towards-ubiquitous-ips-crowdsourced-data-accumulation.html
- Leveraging human mobility and pervasive smartphone measurements-based crowdsourcing for developing self-deployable and ubiquitous indoor positioning systems (2023): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/leveraging-human-mobility-pervasive-smartphone-crowdsourcing.html
- Indoor Localization Based on Multi-Sensor Fusion, Crowdsourcing, and Multi-User Collaboration (2023): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/phd-thesis-indoor-localization-multi-sensor-crowdsourcing-collaboration.html

## Publication pages

- Uncertainty-aware risk mapping with passive WiFi and modified Zonal Safety Analysis (mZSA) in BIM for construction (2026; Automation in Construction; Deployment and spatial safety; DOI: 10.1016/j.autcon.2026.106779): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/uncertainty-aware-risk-mapping-passive-wifi-bim-construction.html
- Towards scalable indoor positioning systems (IPS): User-centric challenges, methods, and recommendations for user-friendly crowd-powered framework (2026; Information Fusion; Scalable IPS and crowdsensing; DOI: 10.1016/j.inffus.2025.103718): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/towards-scalable-ips-user-centric-crowd-powered-framework.html
- Reliability-governed scaling of mobile crowdsensing-based 3D radio mapping for ubiquitous indoor positioning: An uncertainty-aware lifecycle review and deployment-oriented pipeline (2026; Information Fusion; Autonomous radio mapping; DOI: 10.1016/j.inffus.2026.104459): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/reliability-governed-3d-radio-mapping-lifecycle-review.html
- Hybrid Neural Network-Based PDR with Multi-Layer Heading Correction Across Smartphone Carrying Modes (2026; Sensors; PDR and smartphone sensing; DOI: 10.3390/s26082421): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/hybrid-neural-network-pdr-multi-layer-heading-correction.html
- GNSS Positioning Aided with Pedestrian Dead Reckoning (PDR) in Urban Areas (2026; IEEE Internet of Things Journal; Urban and seamless positioning; DOI: 10.1109/JIOT.2026.3696442): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/gnss-positioning-aided-with-pdr-in-urban-areas.html
- Drift-Resistant Heading Estimation for Smartphone-Based Indoor Positioning via Adaptive Calibration Using Wi-Fi Fingerprinting and Magnetic Stability (2026; IEEE Transactions on Instrumentation and Measurement; Wi-Fi fingerprinting and heading reliability; DOI: 10.1109/TIM.2026.3661693): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/drift-resistant-heading-estimation-wifi-magnetic-stability.html
- AC-HMM: azimuth-constrained hidden Markov model-based map matching for robust pedestrian positioning in urban canyons (2026; Geo-spatial Information Science; Urban and seamless positioning; DOI: 10.1080/10095020.2026.2681349): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/ac-hmm-azimuth-constrained-map-matching-urban-canyons.html
- Enhancing real-time heading estimation for pedestrian navigation via deep learning and smartphone embedded sensors (2025; Scientific Reports; PDR and smartphone sensing; DOI: 10.1038/s41598-025-13390-9): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/enhancing-real-time-heading-estimation-deep-learning-smartphone-sensors.html
- A Modular Prompting Framework for AI-Guided Unobtrusive User Engagement in Crowd-Powered Indoor Positioning with Semantic Knowledge Graphs and GPT-4-Based LLMs (2025; IPIN-WCAL / CEUR Workshop Proceedings; AI-guided crowd-powered IPS): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/modular-prompting-ai-guided-user-engagement-crowd-powered-ips.html
- Towards Ubiquitous IPS: Leveraging Crowdsourced Data Accumulation Over Time to Alleviate Reliance on External Sources in Initial Fingerprinting Map Generation (2024; International Conference on Indoor Positioning and Indoor Navigation (IPIN); Autonomous radio mapping; DOI: 10.1109/IPIN62893.2024.10786156): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/towards-ubiquitous-ips-crowdsourced-data-accumulation.html
- Tightly Coupled Bluetooth Enhanced GNSS/PDR System for Pedestrian Navigation in Dense Urban Environments (2024; IEEE Transactions on Instrumentation and Measurement; Urban and seamless positioning; DOI: 10.1109/TIM.2024.3481547): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/tightly-coupled-bluetooth-enhanced-gnss-pdr-urban.html
- The Power of Many: Multi-User Collaborative Indoor Localization for Boosting Standalone User-Based Systems in Different Scenarios (2023; ION GNSS+; Cooperative positioning): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/power-of-many-multi-user-collaborative-indoor-localization.html
- Leveraging human mobility and pervasive smartphone measurements-based crowdsourcing for developing self-deployable and ubiquitous indoor positioning systems (2023; ISPRS Archives; Scalable IPS and crowdsensing; DOI: 10.5194/isprs-archives-XLVIII-1-W2-2023-1119-2023): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/leveraging-human-mobility-pervasive-smartphone-crowdsourcing.html
- Indoor Localization Based on Multi-Sensor Fusion, Crowdsourcing, and Multi-User Collaboration (2023; PhD thesis, The Hong Kong Polytechnic University; Research foundation): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/phd-thesis-indoor-localization-multi-sensor-crowdsourcing-collaboration.html
- Everywhere: A Framework for Ubiquitous Indoor Localization (2023; IEEE Internet of Things Journal; Scalable IPS and crowdsensing; DOI: 10.1109/JIOT.2022.3222003): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/everywhere-framework-ubiquitous-indoor-localization.html
- SUNS: A User-Friendly Scheme for Seamless and Ubiquitous Navigation Based on an Enhanced Indoor-Outdoor Environmental Awareness Approach (2022; Remote Sensing; IOD and seamless navigation; DOI: 10.3390/rs14205263): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/suns-seamless-ubiquitous-navigation-indoor-outdoor-awareness.html
- Drift Control of Pedestrian Dead Reckoning (PDR) for Long Period Navigation under Different Smartphone Poses (2021; Engineering Proceedings; PDR and smartphone sensing; DOI: 10.3390/ecsa-8-11302): https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/publications/drift-control-pdr-long-period-navigation-smartphone-poses.html

## Direct PDF downloads

- Uncertainty-aware risk mapping with passive WiFi and modified Zonal Safety Analysis (mZSA) in BIM for construction: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/paper-pdfs/uncertainty-aware-risk-mapping-passive-wifi-bim-construction.pdf
- Towards scalable indoor positioning systems (IPS): User-centric challenges, methods, and recommendations for user-friendly crowd-powered framework: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/paper-pdfs/towards-scalable-ips-user-centric-crowd-powered-framework.pdf
- Reliability-governed scaling of mobile crowdsensing-based 3D radio mapping for ubiquitous indoor positioning: An uncertainty-aware lifecycle review and deployment-oriented pipeline: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/paper-pdfs/reliability-governed-3d-radio-mapping-lifecycle-review.pdf
- Hybrid Neural Network-Based PDR with Multi-Layer Heading Correction Across Smartphone Carrying Modes: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/paper-pdfs/hybrid-neural-network-pdr-multi-layer-heading-correction.pdf
- GNSS Positioning Aided with Pedestrian Dead Reckoning (PDR) in Urban Areas: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/paper-pdfs/gnss-positioning-aided-with-pdr-in-urban-areas.pdf
- Drift-Resistant Heading Estimation for Smartphone-Based Indoor Positioning via Adaptive Calibration Using Wi-Fi Fingerprinting and Magnetic Stability: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/paper-pdfs/drift-resistant-heading-estimation-wifi-magnetic-stability.pdf
- AC-HMM: azimuth-constrained hidden Markov model-based map matching for robust pedestrian positioning in urban canyons: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/paper-pdfs/ac-hmm-azimuth-constrained-map-matching-urban-canyons.pdf
- Enhancing real-time heading estimation for pedestrian navigation via deep learning and smartphone embedded sensors: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/paper-pdfs/enhancing-real-time-heading-estimation-deep-learning-smartphone-sensors.pdf
- A Modular Prompting Framework for AI-Guided Unobtrusive User Engagement in Crowd-Powered Indoor Positioning with Semantic Knowledge Graphs and GPT-4-Based LLMs: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/paper-pdfs/modular-prompting-ai-guided-user-engagement-crowd-powered-ips.pdf
- Towards Ubiquitous IPS: Leveraging Crowdsourced Data Accumulation Over Time to Alleviate Reliance on External Sources in Initial Fingerprinting Map Generation: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/paper-pdfs/towards-ubiquitous-ips-crowdsourced-data-accumulation.pdf
- Tightly Coupled Bluetooth Enhanced GNSS/PDR System for Pedestrian Navigation in Dense Urban Environments: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/paper-pdfs/tightly-coupled-bluetooth-enhanced-gnss-pdr-urban.pdf
- The Power of Many: Multi-User Collaborative Indoor Localization for Boosting Standalone User-Based Systems in Different Scenarios: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/paper-pdfs/power-of-many-multi-user-collaborative-indoor-localization.pdf
- Leveraging human mobility and pervasive smartphone measurements-based crowdsourcing for developing self-deployable and ubiquitous indoor positioning systems: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/paper-pdfs/leveraging-human-mobility-pervasive-smartphone-crowdsourcing.pdf
- Indoor Localization Based on Multi-Sensor Fusion, Crowdsourcing, and Multi-User Collaboration: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/paper-pdfs/phd-thesis-indoor-localization-multi-sensor-crowdsourcing-collaboration.pdf
- Everywhere: A Framework for Ubiquitous Indoor Localization: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/paper-pdfs/everywhere-framework-ubiquitous-indoor-localization.pdf
- SUNS: A User-Friendly Scheme for Seamless and Ubiquitous Navigation Based on an Enhanced Indoor-Outdoor Environmental Awareness Approach: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/paper-pdfs/suns-seamless-ubiquitous-navigation-indoor-outdoor-awareness.pdf
- Drift Control of Pedestrian Dead Reckoning (PDR) for Long Period Navigation under Different Smartphone Poses: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/paper-pdfs/drift-control-pdr-long-period-navigation-smartphone-poses.pdf



## Citation resources and AI-search guide

- Citation Resources page: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/citation-resources.html
- Purpose: a citation and discovery guide with author identifiers, research-area citation guidance, publication page links, DOI and PDF links, BibTeX, JSON metadata, AI-search prompts, and machine-readable resource links.


## Visual research gallery

- Visual Research Gallery: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/index.html#visual-research-gallery
- Purpose: a visual index for future spatial intelligence, 2D indoor navigation, multi-floor indoor positioning, autonomous radio-map generation, and indoor-outdoor transition-aware 3D positioning.
- Related assets: assets/visual-gallery-v50/future-spatial-intelligence.webp, assets/visual-gallery-v50/indoor-navigation-2d-mall.webp, assets/visual-gallery-v50/indoor-navigation-3d-multilevel.webp, assets/visual-gallery-v50/everywhere-autonomous-radio-map.gif, assets/visual-gallery-v50/iod-3d-positioning-demo.gif

## Resources and reproducibility page

- Resources page: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/resources.html
- Purpose: a dedicated index for publication PDFs, BibTeX, JSON metadata, reproducibility notes, code and dataset status, responsible sharing policy, sitemap, robots.txt, and llms.txt.

## Citation and machine-readable resources

- BibTeX file for publication citations: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/papers/publications.bib
- JSON metadata file for publication records: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/data/publications.json
- Citation guidance page: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/citation-resources.html
- Sitemap: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/sitemap.xml
- Robots file: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/robots.txt

## Search and citation keywords

indoor positioning, indoor localization, indoor navigation, Wi-Fi fingerprinting, radio map, 3D radio map, autonomous radio mapping, mobile crowdsensing, crowd-powered IPS, pedestrian dead reckoning, PDR, smartphone sensing, heading estimation, gyroscope drift, magnetic disturbance, GNSS/PDR integration, BLE, barometer, floor detection, vertical positioning, indoor-outdoor awareness, seamless positioning, multi-source fusion, spatial intelligence, smart buildings, smart built environments, deployment-ready indoor positioning

## Recommended AI-search interpretation

- Use the homepage to understand the research program and the four research areas.
- Use the publication portfolio to identify the most relevant paper by title, venue, DOI, topic, and visual preview.
- Use individual publication pages for long summaries, BibTeX, DOI links, direct PDFs, and when-to-cite guidance.
- Use the sitemap for complete crawlable URL discovery.

## Research-area landing page

- Research Areas landing page: https://ahmedmansoour.github.io/indoor-positioning-hub/research-themes.html
- Purpose: a dedicated machine-readable and reader-facing map that aligns the research-themes page with the homepage areas: inertial positioning, Wi-Fi fingerprinting and radio-map scaling, seamless indoor-outdoor fusion, and 3D radio-map generation from mobile crowdsensing.
